channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bobby J. Brown, "The Wire" and "Law & Order: SUV" actor, dies at 62
item.description: Bobby J. Brown's breakout role was as a police officer on HBO's "The Wire." He appeared in 12 episodes across four seasons.

item.title: WATCH: Man's mega snowman grows to 23 feet
item.description: ABC News' Danny New explains how a Massachusetts man is building a 23-foot snowman.

item.title: Morgan Freeman on AI trying to replicate his voice: "I've got lawyers"
item.description: Legendary actor Morgan Freeman, who has starred in more than 100 movies in his six-decade career, joins "CBS Mornings" to talk about narrating the doc...

item.title: Trump heads to Texas, where 3 supporters are battling it out in the Senate Republican primary
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading to Texas, his first trip after his State of the Union address. The Republican president plans to talk Friday about h...

item.title: WATCH: Suspected poisoning caught on camera
item.description: A California couple says their roommate sprayed their kitchen with insect poison.

item.title: WATCH: Women's basketball hero gets her ovation
item.description: A walk-on for the top-ranked LSU women's basketball team was diagnosed with a rare heart condition and told she would never play basketball again.

item.title: Over half of Americans say health care, vacation, new car are unaffordable: Poll
item.description: About two-thirds who donât own a home donât think theyâll be able to afford one.

item.title: WATCH: Skier dangles from chairlift
item.description: One California skier was saved by her sister and friend.

item.title: Boy's birth brings hope for Amazon tribe facing possible extinction
item.description: One official calls a newborn boy "a symbol of the resistance of the Akuntsu people, but also a source of hope for Indigenous peoples."

item.title: U.S. military shoots down Border Patrol drone near Texas
item.description: The U.S. military shot down another drone near the Texas border. Kris Van Cleave reports.

item.title: Latest news on Columbia student Elmina Aghayeva after she was detained by ICE
item.description: Columbia University student Elmina Aghayeva has been released after ICE took her from one of the institution's residential buildings. CBS News' Tom Ha...

item.title: The Trump administration is detaining and questioning refugees already admitted to the US
Deadly shooting in Cuban waters highlights obsessions with counter-revolution as US pressure mounts
